tools.name: tool_gads_chat
tools.description: Google Ads — connect account, manage campaigns (Search/Shopping/Display/Video/PMax), ad groups, Responsive Search Ads, keywords, performance reports, keyword research, budget monitoring, AI performance analysis.

tools.name: skeleton_alert_gads

tools.description: Panel: Campaign detail with ad groups, ads, keywords, and performance.

tools.description: Panel: Performance reports, search terms analysis, and keyword research.
